description.value:
• Those who bare the blood of the great phoenix often proudly display their origins as their natural affinity for fire almost causes them to be mistaken for beings of fire themselves. Beginning at 1st level, You gain resistance to fire damage and reduce cold damage by an amount equal to your proficiency bonus.

At 3rd level, you may use Charisma in place of the appropriate modifier for the attack rolls, and DC of all Suzaku Clan Hijutsu and Ninjutsu with the Fire Release keyword. Jutsus with the Fire Release Keyword now add your Charisma Modifier to their damage dealt if any. This effect can only apply once per casting.

At 7th level, When using a Suzaku Hijutsu or Ninjutsu with the fire release keyword, which would be vulnerable, extinguished, reduced, or ignored by cold damage, they lose that vulnerability. Additionally, you are now immune to the effects of cold enviromental conditions.

At 11th level, Whenever you use a jutsu with the fire release keyword, you ignore resistance and immunity to fire damage.

At 18th level, You gain immunity to fire damage, and effects caused by jutsu that deal fire damage.
